Text.text: Select an application to get started

Button.tooltip: Upload customer file - Auto processes: Template Match → Extract → Validate → Map
View processing runs with stage status (🔴/🟢)

core:Icon.tooltip: Upload & Parse: File upload, template matching, and data extraction
Validate & Map: Data validation and API field mapping
Posted: Document posted to SAP S/4HANA

Button.tooltip: Production Run - Post to SAP S/4HANA
Repost - Retry production run after posting failure
Preview Field Mapping - View extraction, validation, constants and defaults
View Details - See full processing information

Title.text: Manage Field Mapping Rules for Extraction

MessageStrip.text: Reference Document Rules determine which document number (BELNR = Accounting Doc or XBLNR = Invoice Ref) is used for clearing during the lockbox posting process.

TextArea.placeholder: Describe when to use this rule

Input.placeholder: e.g., Accounting document else Invoice document

MessageStrip.text: Constant fields (Lockbox, LockboxBatchOrigin, LockboxBatchDestination) can be edited below. Partner Bank details are fetched from Business Partner API when available, otherwise defaults are used.
Supported formats: Excel (.xlsx, .xls), CSV (.csv), BAI2 (.bai, .bai2), Payment Advice (.txt, .pdf)

Dialog.title: Field Mapping Preview - Complete SAP Payload

MessageStrip.text: This view shows all API fields organized by SAP payload hierarchy: Header → Item → Clearing. Fields marked as SYSTEM are auto-generated, CONSTANT are fixed values, DEFAULT use configured fallbacks, and DIRECT are mapped from your file.
